## Scope

<!-- Tick what applies. -->

- [ ] New behaviour (`feat`)
- [ ] Bug fix (`fix`)
- [ ] Docs only (`docs`)
- [ ] Test only (`test`)
- [ ] Refactor / chore (no behaviour change)
- [ ] Touches scaffolded-project templates (`skills/sn-setup/templates/`)
- [ ] Touches plugin manifest (`.claude-plugin/`)

## Tests

- [ ] `python -m pytest tests/test_sn_init.py -q` passes locally
- [ ] CI green
- [ ] New tests added for the new behaviour (or `n/a` for docs-only PRs)

## Docs

- [ ] `README.md` updated where the new behaviour is user-facing
- [ ] `COMMANDS.md` updated when adding / changing a slash command
- [ ] `WORKFLOW.md` updated when the change joins the spec-loop flow
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` entry added under the relevant version section
